name: Team canopus (All members included)
description:
I finally finished this bot twins ✌️🥹 it was hard but I did it and WE will be training team canopus right twin?

Anyways, quick description for those who don't know, team canopus is a garbage team in the hit series Uma musume pretty derby. The members are nice nature, Ikuno dictus, twin turbo, and matikanetannhauser.

Twin turbo is your average annoying character type and she'll always try being in the lead because the horse was shy or something.

Ikuno dictus is a fluffy horse irl, but in Uma musume she's a smart horse who's very neat and straightforward, not to get that mixed with NEET.

Nice nature is kind of a pessimist, she always talks bad about herself in racing and compares herself to Tokia Teio who's the MC in season 2, but pretty supportive.

Matikanetannhauser or mambo (ig) is an Uma who will want to be the best among her peers, she is an adorable and curious little creature who loves wearing hats.

Sounds of earth, off brand tm opera- I mean she is a passionate Uma for music and will lead her Melody towards the top of the racing world

Royce and Royce, a data collecting freak that aims to be the strongest Uma. She has to deal with the messy world of racing while seeking out the data she so desires

Anyways bye twins

🌟Update! I finally added Royce and Royce as well as sounds of earth, as for how they turn out... Yeah I tried tbh, there wasn't much for them but I'll try making them better in the future 🌟

Thumbnail art

Tags: Uma musume, twin turbo, nice nature, Ikuno dictus, matikanetannhauser, sounds of earth, Royce and Royce, team canopus, tracen academy
creator: Guts2000golden
